steps.description: High quality superstructure-free Bi1.74Pb0.38Sr1.88CuO6+δ (Pb-Bi2201) single crystal was grown by floating-zone technique.

Through Oxygen or Argon annealing, overdoped samples with various superconducting transition temperatures (Tc's) were prepared: 0K (x=0.27), 5K (x=0.26), 7K (x=0.258), 10K (x=0.252), 16K (x=0.24) and 22K (x=0.225).

synthesis.notes: Samples were prepared with various doping levels by oxygen or argon annealing. Hole concentrations estimated using empirical formula Tc = Tc,opt[1 - 82.6(x - 0.16)^2] with Tc,opt = 34K for Bi2201. Transition widths are typically 1-2K. A Pb-free optimally doped Bi2201 (Tc=34K, x=0.16) was also studied for comparison.

steps.description: High quality superstructure-free single crystal was grown by floating-zone technique
Oxygen or Argon annealing to prepare overdoped samples with different superconducting phase transition temperatures

synthesis.notes: Through Oxygen or Argon annealing, overdoped samples were prepared with superconducting phase transition temperature Tc's (dopings) of 0K (0.27), 5K (0.26), 7K (0.258), 10K (0.252), 16K (0.24) and 22K (0.225). Hole concentration x's are estimated based on the empirical formula Tc = Tc,opt[1 − 82.6(x − 0.16)²], where Tc,opt = 34K for Bi2201.
